summary: Iteration 82: Tested Enterprise Desktop Integration features - macOS-style dock/taskbar, right-click context menus on Spa appointments and Guest360 profile, live order tracking, email service. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend taskbar with 9 icons, clock, online indicator, and ⌘K hint working. Guest ordering full flow with 4-step tracking working.

console_warnings.issue: React validateDOMNesting warning - <tr> cannot appear as child of <div> (RightClickMenu wrapper)
console_warnings.note: Non-blocking warning, context menu still works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RightClickMenu wrapper in Spa appointments causes validateDOMNesting warning (div inside tbody). Consider using a different wrapper approach for table rows.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all taskbar icons, context menus, guest ordering flow working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 tested Desktop Taskbar (macOS-style dock) with 9 quick-launch icons, clock, online indicator, and ⌘K shortcut hint. Right-click context menus work on Spa appointments (Check In, Complete, Cancel, No-Show, View Profile, Send Reminder) and Guest360 profile header (Send Email, Mark VIP, Loyalty Program, View Folio, Order IRD). Guest ordering flow works end-to-end with 4-step live tracking (Received → Preparing → On the Way → Delivered). Email service logs to MongoDB in demo mode (no SendGrid key).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/guest-order/menu - returns menu with current_period, categories, items
POST /api/guest-order/order - places order, returns order_id, total, estimated_delivery_mins
frontend_desktop_taskbar_tests: 9 quick-launch icons found: Dashboard, Housekeeping, IRD, Concierge, Engineering, FOH, Guest360, Spa, Routing
Clock with time found in taskbar (format: HH:MM)
Clicking Dashboard taskbar icon opens Dashboard panel
Clicking Housekeeping taskbar icon opens Housekeeping panel
Clicking Spa taskbar icon opens Spa Wellness panel
Clicking Guest360 taskbar icon opens Guest 360 panel
frontend_spa_context_menu_tests: Spa Wellness panel opens via taskbar
Appointments tab loads with appointment rows
Right-click on appointment row shows context menu
Context menu has Check In, Complete, Cancel options
frontend_guest360_tests: Search results appear and are clickable
Guest profile loads with Total Spend, Interactions, Spa History, Minibar data
frontend_guest_ordering_tests: Auth screen loads with Room Number and Last Name inputs
Menu screen shows 'All Day Menu' with 4 category tabs (Food & Dining, Beverages, Sundries, Amenities)
Add button adds item to cart
View Order button shows cart count and total
Cart drawer opens with item details, quantity controls, special instructions
Order confirmation/tracking screen shows 4-step progress indicator
'Live tracking — updates every 5 seconds' text visible

mocked_apis.email_sending: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - logs to MongoDB instead (no SENDGRID_API_KEY configured)

desktop_taskbar.details: macOS-style dock at bottom center with 9 quick-launch icons, clock, online indicator, ⌘K hint

spa_context_menus.details: Right-click on appointment rows shows context menu with Check In, Complete, Cancel, No-Show, View Profile, Send Reminder options

guest360_context_menus.details: Right-click on profile header shows context menu with Send Email, Mark VIP, Loyalty Program, View Folio, Order IRD options

guest_ordering_live_tracking.details: Full flow: auth → menu → cart → order → 4-step live tracking (Received → Preparing → On the Way → Delivered)

email_service.details: Logs emails to MongoDB when SENDGRID_API_KEY not set
